one_time_description: Insurance claim proceeds of $339,863 recorded as revenue in 2022 (nil in prior year budget)
economic_notes: First Nation is currently working on a windtower project under economic development segment. Operations include fisheries, aquaculture, tobacco and fuel sales, boat shop, and consulting activities.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Indian Island First Nation Government Administration, Trust Funds, Indian Island Acquaculture Development Corporation, Indian Island Economic Development Corporation, and Indian Island First Nation Consulting Corporation. Net debt position of $1,654,684. Bank overdraft of $49,822 at year end. New bank loan of $155,000 taken during the year. ISC funding estimated from Note 3 accounts receivable balance; total government transfers include federal operating $4,000,819 + federal capital $1,147,627 + provincial operating $368,708 = $5,517,154. OSR calculated as total revenue minus total government transfers. Auditor draws attention to Note 23 noting budget figures are unaudited. Lease receivable of $105,500 repayable over three annual installments of $35,000 plus 5% interest maturing November 2024.
